title: Rhodostemonodaphne anomala

The classification of Rhodostemonodaphne anomala includes its assignment to the genus Rhodostemonodaphne and the family Lauraceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as laurels. The plant has been found to possess several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antimalarial properties, which have been attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and prevent the development of malaria.
